title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
summary_full: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
summary_public: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
